title: Act 2/2025
text: Complaint lodged before the Hellenic Competition Commission by the company under the name “MARILENA ANDRIOTI SINGLE-MEMBER PC” and the distinctive title “BOIREΜ SINGLE-MEMBER PC” against the company under the name “ATHENIAN BREWERY S.A.” alleging an infringement of Article 2 of Law 3959/2011, as in force, and Article 102 TFEU. Act 2/2025 File (PDF) Act 2/2025 Date of Issuance of Act March 31st, 2025 Relevant Market(s) The markets for the production and distribution of beer and cider. Subject of the Act The complaint lodged on 5.3.2020 before the Hellenic Competition Commission by the company under the name “MARILENA ANDRIOTI SINGLE-MEMBER PC” and the distinctive title “BOIREΜ SINGLE-MEMBER PC” against the company under the name “ATHENIAN BREWERY S.A.” alleging an infringement of Article 2 of Law 3959/2011, as in force, and Article 102 TFEU Legal Framework Articles 2, 36 and 37 of Law 3959/2011 Operative part of the Decision The complaint under ref. no. 1872/5.3.2020 is closed without any further action as obviously unfounded on the grounds detailed in this Act, pursuant to Article 37 (2), in conjunction with Article 36 (4) of Law 3959/2011. This Act shall be notified to the parties concerned pursuant to Article 37 (3) of the same Law. Company(ies) concerned “MARILENA ANDRIOTI SINGLE-MEMBER PC” (distinctive title: “BOIREΜ SINGLE-MEMBER PC”) “ATHENIAN BREWERY S.A.” Judicial Proceedings - Decisions by the Court of Appeal of Athens (Administrative Division) -
